title: 2009 Iridium-Cosmos Replay Maneuver Brief

briefing.headline: OrbitGuard recommends a low-delta-v avoidance maneuver for 2009 Iridium-Cosmos Replay.
briefing.summary: Recommend candidate mnv-2009-replay-a: 0.12 m/s along track prograde burn 4.0 hours before TCA. Estimated Pc changes from 4.120e-04 to 3.095e-132, while miss distance changes from 742.5 m to 8.52 km. Secondary screening status is warning: Secondary screening could not find a candidate-specific fixture, so the maneuver is not marked clear. Screened objects: 0.
key_points: Recommend candidate mnv-2009-replay-a: 0.12 m/s along track prograde burn 4.0 hours before TCA.
Estimated Pc changes from 4.120e-04 to 3.095e-132, while miss distance changes from 742.5 m to 8.52 km.
Secondary screening status is warning: Secondary screening could not find a candidate-specific fixture, so the maneuver is not marked clear. Screened objects: 0.
limitations: Pc uses an assumed covariance model because public TLEs do not include covariance.
Maneuver effects use the documented Round 1 along-track lead-time surrogate.
This is a simulation recommendation, not spacecraft command authority.

sections.title: Decision
sections.body: Recommend candidate mnv-2009-replay-a: 0.12 m/s along track prograde burn 4.0 hours before TCA.

sections.title: Risk Reduction
sections.body: Estimated Pc changes from 4.120e-04 to 3.095e-132, while miss distance changes from 742.5 m to 8.52 km.

sections.title: Secondary Screening
sections.body: Secondary screening status is warning: Secondary screening could not find a candidate-specific fixture, so the maneuver is not marked clear. Screened objects: 0.

sections.title: Audit Trail
sections.body: Scenario run scenario-run-2009-replay-001; conjunction conj-2009-replay-001; TCA 2026-02-10T16:56:00Z; plan maneuver-plan-2009-replay-001; selected candidate mnv-2009-replay-a.

assumptions: Round 1 planner evaluates small impulsive along-track candidates only.
Miss-distance gain is approximated as delta-v times lead time times a documented fixture gain factor.
The selected maneuver is a simulation recommendation and still requires secondary screening.
Final-round work should replace the surrogate with post-burn orbit propagation and multi-axis optimization.
Post-burn miss-distance gain uses a documented Round 1 along-track lead-time surrogate.
Pc is recomputed with the same covariance model used for the pre-maneuver conjunction.
Missing secondary-risk fixture is treated as incomplete screening.
OrbitGuard must not display a clear status when secondary screening is incomplete.
Estimated Pc is not operational-grade without real covariance.
The maneuver is a simulation recommendation, not spacecraft command authority.
warnings: No secondary-risk fixture found for candidate 'mnv-2009-replay-a'.
